title: HirQuery-based staged analysis traversal
body:
## What was done

Removed an unused traversal module and refactored **staged analysis** to traverse HIR via **`HirQuery`**—a single query API for parent/child/sibling navigation during rules.

## Why it mattered

`HirQuery` became the canonical traversal surface for semantic passes, replacing one-off walkers and aligning with the phase-indexed HIR model.

## Outcome

Informed later Beskid analyze/normalize/type passes on one typed-HIR spine.

source.subject: Remove unused traversal module and refactor staged analysis to use HirQuery for HIR traversal
